posts.raw_content:
The best president ever! Never will be another like him. Please we all must unite and put the infighting causing division aside. We must stand by Trump through thick and thin. Try to remember back to the night Trump won. We were all on cloud 9. Thanking the Lord Jesus, singing, dancing. Couldn't wait to go to work and see all the liberals with a huge smile on my face. 
                                                                                                                                     
Remember how the DemonCrats, DemonState, RINOpukes were in utter shock, were crying rivers going ballistic, had to seek psychiatric and medical care to be able to just function during Trumps term. Remember Kamala's concession speech. Just imagine if we lose the midterms and 2028 and these criminals are in power again. Their vengeance against MAGA and Christians and Trump and his family and Trump admin will make the Biden years seem like Disneyland.
                                                                                                                                                          
Please don't give up on Trump. He has not given up on us and America. We must pray every day without ceasing for the protection of our president, for us to win the midterms so we can complete our mission to where no democrat communist can ever win the presidency again. Let's not let Charlie Kirks (RIP) death go in vain. We are on the right side of morals, decency, faith and Biblical values. No more talk about the stuff that divides us right now. Let's focus on winning the midterms. Pray without ceasing. All Praise to the one and ONLY Lord and Savior Jesus Christ!
